summary: KE-7 sprint fully complete: cross-repo-blast-radius invariant (#1415, PR #1425) merged and live; octi-pulpo policy #1410 closed. Starting KE-8 dogfood correctness sprint. Two P1 dogfood issues emerged from readybench agents: #1430 (hook stderr output blocking allowed commits) and #1427 (persona.env not protected by no-governance-self-modification). Both assigned to kernel-sr. Swarm P0 #1431 escalated — codex budget exhausted until April 3, 53.7% failure rate — requires human action.

sprintTransition.nextGoal: Dogfood correctness — hook stderr blocking (#1430) + persona.env identity protection (#1427)

kernelIssuesReviewed.note: Codex budget exhausted until 2026-04-03T02:25Z. 53.7% agent failure rate. Human action needed: kill zombie vitest PIDs 1183028 1183035 1183037.

kernelIssuesReviewed.analysis: claude-hook writes allow-messages to stderr; Claude Code treats any stderr from PreToolUse as blocking error. Fix: route allow-path messages to stdout in apps/cli/src/commands/claude-hook.ts.
no-governance-self-modification does not cover .agentguard/persona.env. Extend path patterns in packages/invariants/src/definitions.ts.

actions: Monitor claude-code circuit re-probe (reset at midnight UTC)
Codex agents blocked until 2026-04-03T02:25Z — no workaround
Gemini budget exhaustion requires manual replenishment

dogfoodObservations.description: KERNEL BUG: claude-hook PreToolUse stderr output blocks allowed tool calls. Unattended QA agents cannot commit or push without workarounds.
dogfoodObservations.proposedFix: In apps/cli/src/commands/claude-hook.ts: route allow-path status messages to stdout; reserve stderr for actual errors (deny, invariant violation, system error).

dogfoodObservations.description: INVARIANT GAP: no-governance-self-modification does not protect .agentguard/persona.env. Automated agents can overwrite governance identity, corrupting audit attribution.
dogfoodObservations.proposedFix: Add .agentguard/persona.env to protected path patterns in definitions.ts. Audit other identity-bearing files under .agentguard/.
